data.title: iGarden offers free trials of high-tech pool innovations in California, such as Swim Jet and Robotic Pool Cleaner.
data.description: In Los Angeles on August 7, 2025, iGarden introduced their latest products aimed at enhancing outdoor living experiences. The brand, affiliated with the Fairland Group, focuses on utilizing cutting-edge technology to provide families with entertainment and convenience. Some of their popular innovations include the Swim Jet and Robotic Pool Cleaner. The recent release of the "Free Pool Perfection" campaign showcases iGarden's commitment to transforming ordinary pools into pristine retreats, available at no cost for new customers.

data.title: Inventor from Kansas City develops All Systems in 1 Super TV for multiple devices. OSK-1175.
data.description: An inventor from Kansas City, Mo., shared his inspiration behind the creation of the ALL SYSTEMS IN 1 SUPER T V which allows users to integrate gaming systems, personal computers, and various electronic devices with a smart television. The invention, unveiled on August 7, 2025, in Pittsburgh, merges different technologies to provide a versatile entertainment experience. This innovation aims to streamline the user's interaction with multiple devices, making it accessible and convenient.

data.title: Marriott Int'l (Nasdaq: MAR) declared a quarterly dividend of 67 cents/share and increased share buyback authorization.
data.description: Marriott International, a company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol MAR, disclosed on August 7, 2025, that its board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of 67 cents per common share. Shareholders as of the record date will receive this dividend on September 30, 2025.

data.title: Sharplink aims to raise $200M through common stock sales at $19.50/share for increasing its Ethereum reserves, currently valued at nearly $2B.
data.description: The ETH treasury company is offering its common stock at a price of $19.50 per share in order to raise capital. The funds generated will supplement its existing Ethereum reserves, which currently amount to almost $2 billion.

data.title: Protalix BioTherapeutics to reveal Q2 2025 results on August 14, 2025. Conference call and webcast at 8:30am EDT.
data.description: Protalix BioTherapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development, production, and commercialization of recombinant therapeutic proteins, will be conducting a conference call and webcast on August 7, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EDT. The company, listed on NYSE American as PLX, is based in Carmiel, Israel.

data.title: Ralph Lauren reports strong Q1 results: Revenue up 14% to $1.72 billion, adjusted earnings beat at $3.77 per share. Stock plunges on cautious outlook.
data.description: Ralph Lauren Corp. reported a strong first quarter of fiscal 2026 with revenues reaching $1.72 billion, a 14% increase from the previous year, beating analyst estimates of $1.64 billion. Adjusted earnings per share were $3.77, surpassing expectations of $3.43. GAAP net income stood at $220 million, with a diluted share price of $3.52, compared to $169 million and $2.61 per share the previous year. Gross profit rose to $1.24 billion, with a gross margin increase of 180 basis points to 72.3%, due to higher retail pricing, a favorable mix, and lower cotton costs. Direct-to-consumer sales saw a 13% increase, with strong digital commerce growth across all markets. North America revenue also grew by 8% to $656 million, with a 12% rise in comparable store sales. Adjusted operating income was $293 million, and the operating margin improved by 270 basis points to 17.0%.

data.title: Zimmer Biomet's Q2 sales reach $2.08B, surpassing estimates. Reported 7% increase in revenue, with knee sales up 3.1% and hip sales up 5.8%.
data.description: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ZBH) has announced its second-quarter results, with adjusted earnings reaching $2.07 per share, marking a 3% increase from the previous year and surpassing Street expectations of $1.99 per share. The orthopedic implant manufacturer recorded sales of $2.08 billion for the quarter, reflecting a 7% increase on a reported basis, a 5.4% increase on a constant currency basis, and a 2.8% increase on an organic constant currency basis, exceeding the consensus of $2.05 billion. Sales of knee products rose by 3.1% to $826 million (1.8% organically), while hip product sales increased by 5.8% to $536.1 million (4% organically). Sports Medicine products also performed well, generating sales of $550.6 million, up by 17.3% (4.9%). However, sales of Technology & Data, Bone Cement, and Surgical products experienced a slight decrease of 0.2%. More details are available for review on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Celsius Holdings stock up due to Q2 earnings, with sales hitting $739.259 million (+84%) and EPS at 47 cents (vs. 23 cents).
data.description: Celsius Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: CELH) witnessed a surge in shares on Thursday following the release of their second-quarter earnings report that exceeded expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 47 cents for the quarter, surpassing the forecasted 23 cents by analysts. Quarterly sales reached $739.259 million, showing a significant 84% increase compared to the previous year and surpassing the projected $633.582 million. This growth was largely attributed to the success of the Alani Nu brand, which contributed $301.2 million in revenue following its acquisition on April 1. Additionally, the company saw a doubling of EBITDA and strong global expansion during the period. For further details, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Quantiphi, an AI-first digital engineering company, achieves Google Cloud Data Management Specialization, proving expertise in helping enterprises build scalable solutions.
data.description: Breaking news out of Marlborough, Massachusetts on August 7, 2025 - Quantiphi, a leading AI-focused digital engineering firm, has just been awarded the prestigious Google Cloud Partner Advantage Specialization in Data Management. This recognition comes as a result of their exceptional work in assisting businesses with creating scalable data solutions. This achievement underscores Quantiphi's reputation as a top player in the industry, showcasing their expertise in leveraging AI technologies for data management. With this new recognition, Quantiphi is poised to further enhance its reputation and expand its offerings to help businesses optimize their data strategies.

data.title: Corporate spending on AI is surging, as data centers see a 50% increase in power demand by 2027. Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, and Meta expected to invest $200 billion this year in AI-related ventures, impacting GDP growth and job market.
data.description: The post-pandemic recovery has shifted towards corporate spending, driven by investments in artificial intelligence. Goldman Sachs predicts a 50% increase in global power demand from data centers by 2027, leading to a surge in spending on AI-dedicated data centers. Companies like Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, and Meta are set to spend over $200 billion on capital expenditures this year on AI-related investments. This shift in spending dynamics marks a macroeconomic force as AI continues to evolve. Meanwhile, traditional consumer spending is plateauing as durable goods consumption decreases and pandemic stimulus savings are depleted. The U.S. economy's resilience is now fueled by mega-corporations instead of average consumers, with employment in data center construction on the rise and suppliers struggling to meet demands. GDP for the second quarter jumped 3%, reflecting the impact of this shift towards corporate spending.

data.title: Farmina Pet Foods' Genius AI wins Pet Care Innovation of the Year award for personalized 24/7 support.
data.description: Farmina Pet Foods, a renowned global leader in premium pet nutrition, has unveiled that its award-winning Genius AI platform offers round-the-clock expert pet care assistance through personalized guidance. The platform, which is powered by artificial intelligence, has been recognized for excellence in the field. This innovative technology is designed to provide optimal care and support for pets, ensuring they receive the best possible attention and advice. The company, based in Reidsville, North Carolina, made this announcement on August 7, 2025, highlighting the cutting-edge capabilities of the platform. This demonstrates Farmina's commitment to advancing the pet care industry by utilizing advanced technology to deliver top-quality service.

data.title: PetVivo to hold conference call on Aug 14, 2025 at 5:00pm ET to discuss first fiscal quarter results ending June 30, 2025.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to be held by PetVivo Holdings, Inc. on Thursday, August 14, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time to review the financial performance for the fiscal first quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. PetVivo Holdings, Inc., a prominent biomedical firm specializing in pioneering medical solutions for equines and companion animals, will be sharing the results during the call. The company's stock is listed as OTCQX: PETV, with the OTCID being PETVW. The official financial report will be released to the public via a press release before the scheduled conference call.

data.title: Ethereum Treasury firm to raise $200M through SharpLink, selling shares at $19.50 each for more ETH buys.ETH holdings near $2B.
data.description: The ETH treasury company is offering its common stock shares at a price of $19.50 each to generate funds. The goal is to increase its existing Ethereum reserves, which currently amount to close to $2 billion.
